claims.claim: プロセス管理部門における独自のインストールドベース（設置済み機器基盤）が、MRO（維持・修理・運転）需要の安定的な収益源として機能している
claims.evidence: Q4 2015 Q&A（CEO発言）: 'we do have our unique installed base parts. So our -- basically, our day-to-day MRO, small project business will help us there.' / Q1 2015 Q&A: 'Our installed base has grown dramatically. So the answer is yes. However, it's always about timing... part of our investments the last 3 years has been building out a stronger and stronger global service organization. So we actually have the assets in place to take advantage of this.'

evidence_sources.speaker: David Farr

claims.claim: 過去10年のプロセス管理・工業オートメーション設備への継続投資により、グローバルに積み上げられた大規模なインストールドベースが、MROサービス収益の安定した需要源となっている
claims.evidence: Q1 2015 Q&A（CEO発言）: 'if you look at the last 10 years of our capital, our money we sold in this industry, how do we take advantage of that? That's going to be the key focus point for us because you're going to have a window here where you lose -- the projects aren't going to happen for you. You have to go out and get that business day in and day out.'

claims.claim: プロセス管理セグメントの大型プロジェクト縮小時に、収益性の高い小規模プロジェクト・MROビジネスへのミックスシフトにより、利益率を防衛できる
claims.evidence: Q3 2015 Q&A（CEO発言）: 'When the large projects slow down, we have -- typically, what we'll see is a smaller type of project business. And that business, usually, better profitability-wise. So if you think about the profitability, the hardest for us are the large; the smaller projects are good; and MRO is even better.'

evidence_sources.speaker: David Farr

claims.claim: Emersonは戦略的に「重要な市場」での投資を維持しながらリストラを行い、競合がコスト削減で後退する中でシェア獲得を図るオフェンシブ能力を有している
claims.evidence: Q4 2015 Q&A（CEO発言）: 'We are continuing to play offense... we are not cutting back in certain strategic areas where we think we have unique opportunities to gain share. So yes, we're restructuring, but we're restructuring in an area and areas that we feel that are not strategic relative to gaining that growth opportunities.'
